title: Skillet Chicken Fajitas
description: A classic American dish made with chicken, peppers, onions, and spices, cooked in a skillet. Serve with warm flour tortillas.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add peppers and onions to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-5 minutes.
Add skillet seasoning, salt, and pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the peppers and onions.
Cook until the chicken is cooked through, about 2-3 minutes.
Warm flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble fajitas by placing the chicken and pepper mixture onto a tortilla and serving.
